diagrams.title: Wetland Types Classification
diagrams.description: Shows classification of wetlands based on vegetation and water chemistry
diagrams.purpose: Understand different wetland types and their characteristics

diagrams.title: Wetland as Water Filter
diagrams.description: Cross-section showing how wetlands purify water

diagrams.title: Bog vs Fen Diagram
diagrams.description: Comparison of bog and fen based on water source and characteristics
elements: Bog: Rain → Acidic (pH 3-5) → Dominated by sphagnum
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between ombrotrophic and minerotrophic wetlands
